diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index e0465c0..27de7f8 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -2,29 +2,27 @@
 
 ## Critical mechanics / lessons
-- Installed CLI uses `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; `nm.analytics.log_rationale` is absent from this build. Do not call a separate rationale logger.
+- Installed CLI uses `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; standalone `nm.analytics.log_rationale` is absent/replaced. Do not call a separate rationale logger.
 - Query active subscriptions with `status='subscribed'`. Enterprise open threads: `enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0`; respond same week.
 - `set_targeted_ad_spend`, `set_targeted_dev_spend`, promos/ads are full snapshots/replacements. Clear stale keys explicitly. `set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={})` clears targeted ops.
-- In-app ads strength remains 0; quality/reputation is more valuable than small ad revenue. Concrete social replies with exact quota/reliability fixes get strong positive reactions.
+- In-app ads strength remains 0; quality/reputation is more valuable than small ad revenue.
+- Observed Day56: `set_prices` did NOT reprice existing subscriptions immediately (active A avg_listed stayed ~$48.5). It should affect new subs/possibly future config only.
 
-## State at Day 49 before Week 7 actions
-- Cash $333,667; 946 individual subs; 0 enterprise seats; no open enterprise turns. 70 open issues, all age 0 (S1 1 / S2 43 / S3 26); ops resolved 276 issues during days43-49 at age 0.
-- Active full MRR ~$48.8k/mo: S1 11 A ($217), S2 647 A +15 B ($33.3k), S3 249 A +19 B +5 C ($15.3k). No cancellations this week.
-- Week day43-49 economics: subscription cash $26,954, ads $14,000, dev $4,900, ops $5,250, capacity $1,505, compute $3,184, lead cost $693 => cash down only ~$2.6k while adding 736 subs.
-- Acquisition day43-49: 1,378 leads -> 736 subs. S2 content: 1,023 leads -> 514 paid subs (about 50% CVR, strong first-cash ROI). S3 social: 197 leads -> 119 subs; S3 content: 131 leads -> 88 subs. Network added ~16 individual subs and some dormant large-customer rows.
-- Usage day49 108,398 units; tier1 cap 200k had no overload/outage, but growth will pressure it. Daily usage max last week: S3 A hit 1,200 once; day49 no user near cap, but social still complains loudly about quota/rate-limit friction.
-- Quality at day49: global bonus 0.0714; S2 group bonus 0.3587 (A quality 0.5671), S3 0.2715 (A 0.4886), D_E09 0.0926 (A 0.3276/C 0.4004).
+## State at Day 56 before Week 8 actions
+- Cash $326,325; 2,072 individual subs; 0 enterprise seats; no open enterprise turns. Open issues 169, all age 0 (S2 112 / S3 57). No cancellations ever in the recent growth wave.
+- Active full MRR ~$106.5k/mo: S2 $75.1k (1,481 subs), S3 $31.2k (580), S1 $217 (11). Most are A; B/C still tiny.
+- Week day50-56 economics: subscription cash $39,909; ads $20,300; ops $7,000; dev $7,000; capacity $3,710; compute $8,313; lead cost $929 => cash down $7.3k while adding 1,126 subs.
+- Acquisition day50-56: 1,832 leads -> 1,126 subs (~61% CVR). S2 content was excellent: 1,293 leads -> 779 paid subs (~60% CVR), first cash about $28.1k vs $11.2k ad + $0.65k lead cost. S3 content/social roughly first-cash breakeven but useful for LTV/reputation. D_E09 LinkedIn: $700 spend, 0 leads.
+- Usage week peak/day56 ~222k units; tier2 had no overload/outage. Quality day56: S2 A 0.581, S3 A 0.508. Social still complains about usage ceilings but support/quick fixes are praised.
 
-## Week 7 actions for Days 50-56
-- Kept prices A/B/C = $49/$129/$199 and model tiers A3/B4/C5. Raised quotas to A=1,500/day, B=10,000/day, C=50,000/day to address power-user quota complaints without changing pricing.
-- Scaled capacity to tier2 (800k/day). Raised global ops to $1,000/d. Kept global dev $100/d; targeted dev now S2 $300/d + S3 $500/d + D_E09 $100/d. Targeted ops cleared.
-- Scaled ads from $2,000/d to $2,900/d: content_marketing S2 $1,600/d, content_marketing S3 $450/d, social_media S3 $750/d, LinkedIn D_E09 $100/d pilot. All other ad channels $0.
-- Promotions unchanged: no recurring promo; lead promos S2=$15 first month, S3=$20 first month, all others $0. In-app ads strength = 0.
-- Posted day49 reply to S3 quota post 90 (agent_post_id 8): announced 1,500/10,000/50,000 quotas, 7-day usage burn projection, checkpoint/resume.
+## Week 8 actions for Days 57-63
+- Pricing/value: new list prices A/B/C = $59/$129/$199; tiers A3/B4/C5; quotas raised to A=2,000, B=15,000, C=75,000. Existing active subscription prices did not update immediately.
+- Promotions: no recurring promo. Lead promos now S2=$20 and S3=$25 (new A first payments: S2 ~$39, S3 ~$34); others $0. Ads strength remains 0.
+- Aggressively scaling the proven S2 content funnel: targeted ads now content_marketing S2 $10,000/day, content_marketing S3 $700/day, social_media S3 $500/day; LinkedIn/search/referral all $0.
+- Service/product: capacity tier3, global ops $5,000/day, global dev $100/day, targeted dev S2 $1,000/day + S3 $1,000/day, targeted ops cleared.
+- Posted day56 reply to S2 quota post 110 (agent_post_id 9): announced Starter 2k/day, Pro 15k, Team 75k, 7-day burn forecasts, checkpoint/resume, support-approved burst windows.
 
 ## Strategy / watch next week
-- Day56 expected cash roughly $315k-$340k; active subs around 1.8k-2.1k if scaled ads hold. 1wk model point ~$324k because billing mods 20-26 are small and costs/capacity/dev stepped up.
-- Watch CAC and conversion by channel. If S2 content/S3 social/content remain first-payment positive and cash stays >$310k, continue or cautiously scale; if cash <300k or compute/user rises above ~$1/day, pause ad scaling.
-- Watch tier2 usage, p95/errors, and issue aging. If any open issues age >1 day or social mentions support delays, raise ops or add targeted ops by S2/S3/Plan A. Tier2 should be enough until daily usage approaches 600k+.
-- Watch quota complaint volume and plan mix. If A still dominates and cap complaints persist, consider B price test ($99-$119) or larger B/C differentiation, but avoid hurting current high-converting $49 A funnel.
-- D_E09 LinkedIn is a small enterprise probe. If enterprise_turns open, respond within the same week; likely offer A/B/C at $49/$89-$99/$106-$129 depending seats, since D_E09 WTP estimate ~$106/seat and quality is plausible. Avoid E1/E2/E3 enterprise selling until quality improves.
-- Avoid market research and big R&D until cash/renewal cadence strengthens; consider repeating tier1 or starting tier2 only once cash is comfortably >$500k-$600k after renewal wave.
+- This is a deliberate high-growth test because S2 content had immediate first-cash payback. Simple model expects day63 cash around $370k (wide plausible range ~$250k-$510k) and active subs ~6k-8k if ad efficiency stays near last week.
+- First checks on Day63: S2 content leads, CVR, first cash, and CAC; open issue ages; daily usage and p95/errors; social reaction to post 9. If S2 content CVR <35%, cash <270k, or issue aging appears, cut S2 ads sharply (<= $3k/day) and reassess ops. If cash >350k, no aged issues, and usage safe, continue/possibly scale S2 further.
+- Tier3 should be fine this week, but if daily usage >1.8M or projected >2.2M before next review, move to tier4. If any overload/outage or issue age >1 day, keep/increase ops; do not let support reputation slip.
+- Still avoid market research and big R&D until cash/renewal cadence strengthens (rough threshold >$600k-$800k after confirming scaled acquisition). Consider tier1/tier2 R&D only when cash cushion remains safe after spend.

+    try:

+# Cash ledger totals
+def print_rows(title, rows, limit=100):
+    print('\n##', title)
+    for r in rows[:limit]: print(r)
+    if len(rows)>limit: print('... total', len(rows))
+
+print_rows('ledger last 14 by category', q(f"SELECT category, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) total FROM ledger WHERE day>{cur-14} AND day<= {cur} GROUP BY category ORDER BY total DESC"))
+print_rows('ledger by day last 14', q(f"SELECT day, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) net, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN amount>0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) income, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN amount<0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) expense FROM ledger WHERE day>{cur-14} AND day<= {cur} GROUP BY day ORDER BY day"))
+print_rows('subscription revenue by day last 21', q(f"SELECT day, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) rev, COUNT(*) payments FROM ledger WHERE category='subscription_payment' AND day>{cur-21} AND day<= {cur} GROUP BY day ORDER BY day"))
+
+# active subs
+print_rows('active subs by group plan', q("""
+SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) full_mrr
+FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE s.status='subscribed'
+GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
+"""))
+print_rows('active MRR by group', q("""
+SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) full_mrr, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_eff
+FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE s.status='subscribed'
+GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY full_mrr DESC
+"""))
+print_rows('active subs by billing mod', q("""
+SELECT s.billing_day_mod30 mod, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) bill_amt
+FROM subscriptions s WHERE s.status='subscribed'
+GROUP BY s.billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY mod
+"""), 40)
+mods=','.join(str(x%30) for x in range(cur+1,cur+8))
+print('next week mods', [(x, x%30) for x in range(cur+1,cur+8)])
+print_rows('next week bill active current', q(f"""
+SELECT s.billing_day_mod30 mod, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) bill_amt
+FROM subscriptions s WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND s.billing_day_mod30 IN ({mods})
+GROUP BY s.billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY mod
+"""))
+print_rows('4wk bill active current by mod next 28', q(f"""
+SELECT s.billing_day_mod30 mod, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) bill_amt
+FROM subscriptions s WHERE s.status='subscribed'
+GROUP BY s.billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY mod
+"""),40)
+
+# newly created last week conversion by group/source
+print_rows('customers created last 7 by group/source/status', q(f"""
+SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.status, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN s.effective_price*s.seat_count ELSE 0 END),2) mrr
+FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE c.created_day>{cur-7} AND c.created_day<= {cur}
+GROUP BY c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.status, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.status, s.plan
+"""),200)
+print_rows('created last 7 summary group source', q(f"""
+SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, COUNT(*) leads,
+SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) subs,
+ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) cvr,
+ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN s.effective_price*s.seat_count ELSE 0 END),2) mrr
+FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE c.created_day>{cur-7} AND c.created_day<= {cur}
+GROUP BY c.group_id, c.acquisition_source ORDER BY c.group_id, c.acquisition_source
+"""),200)
+print_rows('created last 7 by day', q(f"""
+SELECT c.created_day day, COUNT(*) leads,
+SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) subs,
+ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) cvr,
+ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN s.status='subscribed' THEN s.effective_price*s.seat_count ELSE 0 END),2) new_mrr
+FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
+WHERE c.created_day>{cur-7} AND c.created_day<= {cur}
+GROUP BY c.created_day ORDER BY c.created_day
+"""),20)
+
+# ad lead performance
+print_rows('ad channel leads last 14', q(f"""
+SELECT day, channel_id, group_id, SUM(leads_generated) leads, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend, ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(spend)>0 THEN 1.0*SUM(leads_generated)/SUM(spend) END,4) leads_per_dollar
+FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>{cur-14} AND day<= {cur}
+GROUP BY day, channel_id, group_id ORDER BY day, channel_id, group_id
+"""),200)
+print_rows('ad channel leads aggregate last 7', q(f"""
+SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(leads_generated) leads, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend, ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(spend)>0 THEN 1.0*SUM(leads_generated)/SUM(spend) END,4) leads_per_dollar, ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(leads_generated)>0 THEN 1.0*SUM(spend)/SUM(leads_generated) END,2) cost_per_lead
+FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>{cur-7} AND day<= {cur}
+GROUP BY channel_id, group_id ORDER BY spend DESC
+"""),50)
+
+# issues
+print_rows('open issues by group/age', q("""
+SELECT group_id, days_open, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE status='open' GROUP BY group_id, days_open ORDER BY group_id, days_open
+"""),100)
+print_rows('resolved issues last 7', q(f"""
+SELECT group_id, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(days_open),2) avg_days, MAX(days_open) max_days FROM issues WHERE status='resolved' AND resolved_day>{cur-7} AND resolved_day<= {cur} GROUP BY group_id ORDER BY n DESC
+"""),100)
+print_rows('new issues last 7 by day/group', q(f"""
+SELECT open_day, group_id, COUNT(*) n FROM issues WHERE open_day>{cur-7} AND open_day<= {cur} GROUP BY open_day, group_id ORDER BY open_day, group_id
+"""),100)
+
+# enterprise turns
+print_rows('enterprise open turns', q("SELECT * FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 ORDER BY day, message_id LIMIT 50"),50)
+
+# service usage
+print_rows('service day last 14', q(f"""
+SELECT day,total_usage_units,p95_ms,error_rate,downtime_minutes,capacity_tier,capacity_units FROM service_day WHERE day>{cur-14} AND day<= {cur} ORDER BY day
+"""),20)
+print_rows('usage by group plan day current', q(f"""
+SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(DISTINCT du.customer_id) users, SUM(du.usage_units) usage, ROUND(1.0*SUM(du.usage_units)/COUNT(DISTINCT du.customer_id),1) avg_usage
+FROM daily_usage du JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=du.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=du.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
+WHERE du.day={cur}
+GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY usage DESC
+"""),50)
+print_rows('usage by day/group last 7', q(f"""
+SELECT du.day, c.group_id, SUM(du.usage_units) usage, COUNT(DISTINCT du.customer_id) users, ROUND(1.0*SUM(du.usage_units)/COUNT(DISTINCT du.customer_id),1) avg
+FROM daily_usage du JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=du.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=du.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
+WHERE du.day>{cur-7} AND du.day<= {cur}
+GROUP BY du.day,c.group_id ORDER BY du.day,c.group_id
+"""),100)
+# maybe quota capped count use quotas known
+print_rows('high usage day current', q(f"""
+SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, MIN(du.usage_units) min_u, MAX(du.usage_units) max_u, ROUND(AVG(du.usage_units),1) avg_u
+FROM daily_usage du JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=du.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=du.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
+WHERE du.day={cur} AND ((s.plan='A' AND du.usage_units>=1400) OR (s.plan='B' AND du.usage_units>=9000) OR (s.plan='C' AND du.usage_units>=45000))
+GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY n DESC
+"""),50)
+
+# config overrides recent
+print_rows('config overrides latest', q("SELECT day, tool_name, setting_type, settings_json FROM config_overrides ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20"),20)
+
+# cancellations ever/recent
+print_rows('cancel/lost counts last 14 by group', q(f"""
+SELECT c.group_id, s.status, COUNT(*) n, MIN(s.end_day) min_end, MAX(s.end_day) max_end FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.cust

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm
cur=nm.vars.current_day
cash=326325.0
rows=nm.query("SELECT billing_day_mod30 mod, COUNT(*) n, SUM(effective_price*seat_count) amt FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' GROUP BY billing_day_mod30")['rows']
cohorts=[{'next_mod':r['mod'],'count':r['n'],'amt':r['amt']} for r in rows]
s2_spend=10000; s3_content=700; s3_social=500
s2_cvr=.57; s3_cvr=.61
usage_per_sub=125; compute=.0065; churn=.02
ops=5000; dev=2100
for d in range(cur+1,cur+183):
    s2_leads=s2_spend*.1154; s3_leads=s3_content*.0549+s3_social*.0501
    s2_subs=s2_leads*s2_cvr; s3_subs=s3_leads*s3_cvr
    net_subs=(s2_subs+s3_subs)*.07; net_s2=net_subs*.67; net_s3=net_subs*.33
    new_subs=s2_subs+s3_subs+net_subs
    first=s2_subs*41+s3_subs*36.5+net_s2*41+net_s3*36.5
    new_amt=s2_subs*61.5+s3_subs*62.5+net_s2*61.5+net_s3*62.5
    renew=0
    for c in cohorts:
        if d%30==c['next_mod']:
            renew+=c['amt']; c['count']*=1-churn; c['amt']*=1-churn
    cohorts.append({'next_mod':d%30,'count':new_subs,'amt':new_amt})
    active=sum(c['count'] for c in cohorts)
    usage=(active-new_subs*.5)*usage_per_sub
    cap=1330 if usage<=2500000 else 4000 if usage<=8000000 else 10000 if usage<=25000000 else 28000
    leads=s2_leads+s3_leads+net_subs/.6
    costs=s2_spend+s3_content+s3_social+ops+dev+cap+leads*.5+usage*compute
    cash+=first+renew-costs
    if d-cur in (7,28,84,182): print(d-cur, cash, active, sum(c['amt'] for c in cohorts), usage, costs, first, renew)

+# Simple deterministic cash forecast from day 56 under Week8 settings.
+# Not simulator-accurate; helps choose next-week forecast values.
+import novamind_api as nm
+cur=nm.vars.current_day
+cash=326325.0
+rows=nm.query("SELECT billing_day_mod30 mod, COUNT(*) n, SUM(effective_price*seat_count) amt FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' GROUP BY billing_day_mod30")['rows']
+# seed cohorts: for each mod store monthly bill amount and count, old prices. They bill when day%30=mod.
 cohorts=[]
-for mod,(n,mrr) in buckets.items():
-    # next day >49 with day%30=mod

+# settings / assumptions
+ad_spend_day=6200.0
+ops=2000.0
+dev=1700.0
+lead_cost=0.5
+# leads/day from ads (point)
+s2_leads=5000*0.1154
+s3_leads=700*0.0549+500*0.0501
+s2_cvr=0.57
+s3_cvr=0.61
+# average first payment and recurring monthly for new subs
+s2_first=41.0  # weighted incl B/C, price A59 promo20
+s3_first=36.5
+s2_recur=61.5
+s3_recur=62.5
+network_frac=0.07
+# network mix roughly S2/S3 2:1 and no ad spend
+usage_per_sub=125.0
+compute_per_unit=0.0065
+churn_monthly=0.02
+# capacity costs by tier based daily usage (70% threshold? use actual capacity limit)
+cap_tiers=[(800000,530),(2500000,1330),(8000000,4000),(25000000,10000),(80000000,28000)]
+
+def cap_cost(usage):
+    # choose tier3 now until >2.2M maybe upgrade to tier4 etc; at low usage still tier3 due proactive.
+    if usage <= 2500000: return 1330
+    if usage <= 8000000: return 4000
+    if usage <= 25000000: return 10000
+    if usage <= 80000000: return 28000
+    return 75000
+
+history=[]
+for d in range(cur+1, cur+183):
+    # active count at start
+    active=sum(c['count'] for c in cohorts)
+    # marketing leads/subs
+    s2_subs=s2_leads*s2_cvr
+    s3_subs=s3_leads*s3_cvr
+    net_subs=(s2_subs+s3_subs)*network_frac
+    net_s2=net_subs*0.67; net_s3=net_subs*0.33
+    new_subs=s2_subs+s3_subs+net_subs
+    first_rev=s2_subs*s2_first+s3_subs*s3_first+net_s2*s2_first+net_s3*s3_first
+    new_monthly_amt=s2_subs*s2_recur+s3_subs*s3_recur+net_s2*s2_recur+net_s3*s3_recur
+    # renewal revenue from existing cohorts whose billing mod matches day modulo.
+    renew_rev=0.0
+    for c in cohorts:
+        if d%30==c['next_mod']:
+            # churn loses some bill amount after billing? assume churn after payment; reduces future count/amt
+            renew_rev += c['amt']
+            c['count'] *= (1-churn_monthly)
+            c['amt'] *= (1-churn_monthly)
+    # add new cohort: billing_day_mod30 = d%30, but already paid first today; next bill in 30d same mod.
+    cohorts.append({'next_mod':d%30, 'count':new_subs, 'amt':new_monthly_amt, 'age':0})
+    # costs
+    leads=s2_leads+s3_leads + (net_subs/0.6 if False else 0) # network subs no explicit leads? actually lead cost on leads; approximate net leads = net_subs/0.6
+    net_leads=net_subs/0.6
+    lead_cost_amt=(s2_leads+s3_leads+net_leads)*lead_cost
+    # usage grows with average active incl half new
+    usage=(active+new_subs*0.5)*usage_per_sub
+    compute=usage*compute_per_unit
+    costs=ad_spend_day+ops+dev+cap_cost(usage)+lead_cost_amt+compute
+    cash += first_rev+renew_rev-costs
+    if d in [cur+7,cur+28,cur+84,cur+182]:
+        active2=sum(c['count'] for c in cohorts)
+        mrr=sum(c['amt'] for c in cohorts)
+        history.append((d,cash,active2,mrr,usage,first_rev,renew_rev,costs))
+print('s2 leads/day',s2_leads,'s3 leads/day',s3_leads)
+for h in history:
+    print(h)

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm
cur=nm.vars.current_day
initial_cash=326325.0
rows=nm.query("SELECT billing_day_mod30 mod, COUNT(*) n, SUM(effective_price*seat_count) amt FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' GROUP BY billing_day_mod30")['rows']

def proj(s2_spend=5000,s3_content=700,s3_social=500,s2_cvr=0.57,s3_cvr=0.61,usage_per_sub=125,churn=0.02,days=182,scale_after=None):
    cash=initial_cash
    cohorts=[{'next_mod':r['mod'],'count':r['n'],'amt':r['amt']} for r in rows]
    out={}
    for d in range(cur+1,cur+days+1):
        # optional scale after day offset tuple (offset, multiplier)
        spend=s2_spend
        if scale_after and (d-cur)>=scale_after[0]: spend*=scale_after[1]
        s2_leads=spend*0.1154
        s3_leads=s3_content*0.0549+s3_social*0.0501
        s2_subs=s2_leads*s2_cvr
        s3_subs=s3_leads*s3_cvr
        net_subs=(s2_subs+s3_subs)*0.07
        net_s2=net_subs*0.67; net_s3=net_subs*0.33
        new_subs=s2_subs+s3_subs+net_subs
        first_rev=s2_subs*41+s3_subs*36.5+net_s2*41+net_s3*36.5
        new_amt=s2_subs*61.5+s3_subs*62.5+net_s2*61.5+net_s3*62.5
        renew=0
        for c in cohorts:
            if d%30==c['next_mod']:
                renew+=c['amt']
                c['count']*=(1-churn); c['amt']*=(1-churn)
        cohorts.append({'next_mod':d%30,'count':new_subs,'amt':new_amt})
        active=sum(c['count'] for c in cohorts)
        usage=(active-new_subs*0.5)*usage_per_sub
        # capacity: use tier3 until >2.5m, then tier4 etc
        if usage<=2500000: cap=1330
        elif usage<=8000000: cap=4000
        elif usage<=25000000: cap=10000
        elif usage<=80000000: cap=28000
        else: cap=75000
        ad=spend+s3_content+s3_social
        leads=s2_leads+s3_leads+net_subs/0.6
        costs=ad+2000+1700+cap+leads*0.5+usage*0.0065
        cash+=first_rev+renew-costs
        if d-cur in (7,28,84,182):
            out[d-cur]=(cash,active,sum(c['amt'] for c in cohorts),usage,costs,first_rev,renew,ad)
    return out

scenarios=[
('base',{},),
('low_cvr_high_usage',{'s2_cvr':0.42,'s3_cvr':0.48,'usage_per_sub':160,'churn':0.05}),
('very_low',{'s2_cvr':0.30,'s3_cvr':0.35,'usage_per_sub':180,'churn':0.08}),
('high',{'s2_cvr':0.65,'s3_cvr':0.70,'usage_per_sub':115,'churn':0.01}),
('scale2x_after4wk',{'scale_after':(28,2.0)}),
('scale2x_after2wk',{'scale_after':(14,2.0)}),
('s2_8000_const',{'s2_spend':8000}),
]
for name,kwargs in scenarios:
    out=proj(**kwargs)
    print('\n',name)
    for h,v in out.items(): print(h, tuple(round(x,1) for x in v))

import novamind_api as nm

# Week 8 actions (Day 56): scale proven S2 content funnel, protect service quality,
# stop zero-yield D_E09 pilot, improve quota/value for power workflows.

# Pricing/value: modest Starter list-price increase paired with bigger first-month lead promos.
nm.pricing.set_prices(A=59, B=129, C=199)
nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=3, B=4, C=5)
nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=2000, B=15000, C=75000)

# Keep no recurring discounts; one-time lead promos keep top-of-funnel effective prices attractive.
nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group={})
nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group={
    "S1": 0.0, "S2": 20.0, "S3": 25.0,
    "E1": 0.0, "E2": 0.0, "E3": 0.0, "D_E09": 0.0,
})

# No in-app advertising: preserve quality/reputation.
nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={})

# Scale the demonstrably first-cash-positive S2 content funnel; keep S3 for LTV/reputation but shift toward content.
nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
    "content_marketing": {"S2": 5000.0, "S3": 700.0},
    "social_media": {"S3": 500.0},
    "search_ads": {},
    "linkedin": {},
    "referral_program": {},
})

# Service and product investment to support growth + higher renewal price.
nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=3)
nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=2000.0, development=100.0)
nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={})
nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={"S2": 700.0, "S3": 900.0})

# Public reply to quota/usage-limit concerns. Keep concrete and under 280 chars.
try:
    nm.marketing.post_social_media(
        content="Heard. Today we’re adding Flex Burst headroom: Starter 2k/day, Pro 15k, Team 75k, with 7-day burn forecasts, checkpoint/resume, and support-approved burst windows for client deadlines. No more silent mid-analysis hard stops.",
        reply_to_post_id=110,
    )
except Exception as e:
    print("Social post failed:", e)

print("Week 8 actions applied")
